description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a mesh upper in a light turquoise blue with pink and white accents. The shoe has a visible lace-up closure with standard criss-cross lacing and a padded tongue. The side panels display a distinctive overlay pattern, likely for structural support, and the midsole is thick and white, designed for cushioning. The outsole appears to have a textured tread for grip, with some areas showing a mix of pink and green hues. The overall design suggests a lightweight, breathable construction suitable for urban walking or running. The shoe appears to be in good structural condition with minimal visible wear.
description: A turquoise and pink athletic running shoe with mesh upper, white cushioned sole, and standard lacing, designed for comfort and grip.
description_view_0: The top and side of the shoe are visible, showing the mesh upper, laces, and overlay details in turquoise and pink.
description_view_1: The heel view highlights the back of the shoe, showing the midsole thickness and rear overlay structure.
description_view_2: The bottom view reveals the textured outsole, primarily dark with hints of tread pattern and some color variation.
description_view_3: The side view displays the shoe's profile, including the overlay pattern, lacing, and the full length of the midsole.
